description: Verify and enrich only the highest-value Exa candidates. Prefer Exa Contents/Websets structured enrichment, use Jido web_fetch for ordinary pages/documents, and invoke browser sessions only for JS-required evidence. Acceptance: enrichment policy is budgeted, actor-aware, records citations/evidence, and leaves unresolved candidates explicitly marked rather than guessed.
title: Add budgeted candidate verification and enrichment
